product_surfaces: production CLI index command with stored snapshot creation
production CLI export-snapshot command with stored-ID resolution
production CLI diff-snapshot command with stored base/head ID resolution
production service DiffSnapshot stored-ID path and not-found error surface
production index freshness warnings (stale_index, missing_index, missing_citation) in snapshot export
freshness: current source/build/runtime evidence required; run.sh copies the repository to a temporary workspace, injects offline validation tests only in the temporary copy, and runs targeted Go tests against production packages
mocks_used: No external provider mocks; all tests exercise production service and cache with in-memory SQLite, exercising the real SnapshotStore, DiffSnapshot, export/diff rendering, and CLI dispatch paths.
